beIN 4K.original_title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Bruno Fernandes has 13 Premier League assists this season, the most by a Manchester United player in a single campaign since Antonio Valencia in 2011-12. Only David Beckham in 1999-00  and Nani in 2010-11  have ever provided more in a single campaign in the competition for the club. Having failed to register a goal involvement in any of his first 15 Premier League appearances for Newcastle, Jacob Ramsey has now either scored  or assisted  in each of his last three. He’s never scored or assisted in four consecutive league games before.
